---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**

Example: "I'm frustrated when [...] because [...]"

**Why is this feature valuable?**

Explain the benefit to users, researchers, or developers.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

**Example:**
```python
# Proposed API or usage
model.predict_with_uncertainty(disease_description)
```

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Implementation Details (Optional)

If you have ideas about how this could be implemented:

- Code changes needed
- New dependencies
- Architecture modifications
- Backward compatibility concerns

## Use Case

Provide a concrete example of how this feature would be used:

```python
# Example usage
from src.models import PromptGFM

model = PromptGFM(...)
results = model.new_feature(...)
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request:

- Related papers or techniques
- Similar implementations in other projects
- Links to relevant resources

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem this feature solves
- [ ] I have provided examples of how this feature would be used
- [ ] I have considered backward compatibility
